command: TOKEN=$(cat /root/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null | grep -o '//[^:]*:[^@]*@' | sed 's|//||;s|@||;s|.*:||' | head -1) && curl -s -L -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/22461913767/logs' -o /tmp/run10.zip 2>&1 && cd /tmp && unzip -o run10.zip -d run10_logs 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo '=== Step 3: Install MT5 (last 30 lines) ===' && tail -30 '/tmp/run10_logs/compile/3_Install MetaTrader 5.txt' 2>&1 && echo '=== Step 4: Init Platform (full) ===' && cat '/tmp/run10_logs/compile/4_Initialize platform (download standard library).txt' 2>&1 && echo '=== Step 5: Compile (first 50 lines) ===' && head -50 '/tmp/run10_logs/compile/5_Copy EA files and compile.txt' 2>&1
